/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 365 D/CTS:22/WS/RX/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X:ON JULY 23, 2019, AT DEFENDANT'S PLEA HEARING, DEFENDANT WAIVED 98 DAYS OF CREDITFOR TIME SERVED, DEFENDANT'S CTS CALCULATION HERE IS  EQUAL TO THE DAYS THAT HAVE PASSED SINCE THE TAKING OF HIS PLEA/SAORD/SA1:MARLO GLYMPH OR KENNETH HERRON/SAORD2/SAORD3/X:THE COURT ADMONISHES THE DEFENDANT THAT AS A CONVICTED FELON HE  SHALL BE PROBIHIBTED FROM OWNING, POSSESSING OR HAVING UNDER HIS CARE, CUSTODY OR CONTROL, ANY FIREARM OR OTHER DANGEROUS OR DEADLYWEAPON OR AMMUNITION, INCLUDING AMMUNITION LOADING DEVICES, FOR THE REMAINDER OF HIS LIFE/CTORD:IF THE DEFENDANT PERFORMS SATISFACTORILY ON PROBABIONAND DOES NOT PICK UP ANY NEW CASE, FELONY OR MISDEMEANOR, FROM ANY  JURISDICTION, THE DA AGREES TO DISMMISS THE STRIKE OFFENSE AT COUNT TWO AND ANY ALLEGATION ATTENDANT THERETO, AS A FURTHER INCENTIVE TO DEFENDANT, SHOULD HESUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE THE ABOVE TERMS AND  CONDITIONS, DEFENDANTS PROBATION WILL BE TERMINATED AA SUCCESSFUL AT THREE YEARS,/X:THE COURT SHALL RETAIN JURISDICTION OVER RESTITUTION, IF ANY,/CCC:COUNTS 1 AND 2/X:DEFENDANT SEEKS AN AWARD OF MILESTONE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED COMMENSURATE WITH ANY ELIGIBILE PROGRAMMING HE HAS COMPLETED WHILE IN CUSTODY, AS THISIS A PROGRAM ADMINISTERED BY THE SFSD, THE COURT DEFERS TO THE SFSD ON THISMATTER/
